message.content:
@startuml
title VideoPlayer.vue (FileManager Component)
CVX-AI - Vue & Flask framework interaction

actor User as User
rectangle Website as Website
rectangle Web Server as WebServer
rectangle Filesystem Server as FilesystemServer
database PCFilesystem as PCFilesystem

User -- Website : opens
Website -- WebServer : initialize
Website -- FilesystemServer : initialize
Website -- PCFilesystem : read
WebServer -- FilesystemServer : provide directories
FilesystemServer -- Website : return default directory
Website -- User : display Syncfusion FileManager component

@enduml
